name: Huadian Heavy Industries Co., Ltd.
summary: Huadian Heavy Industries Co., Ltd., an engineering company, engages in power, coal, petrochemical, mining, metallurgy, port, water conservancy, building material, urban construction, and other activities in China and internationally. The company designs, manufactures, supplies, constructs, installs, and commissions material handling systems, including stackers, unloaders, tubular belt conveyors, long distance curve belt conveyors, and large belt conveyors. It also engages in the open-pit mine semi-continuous mining equipment, dumpers, belt conveyors, and other green mining equipment. In addition, the company researches, designs, manufactures, installs, and commissions air-cooling systems; sells heavy duty gas turbine and combined cycle products, and heating systems; designs and manufactures steel structures; and provides bulk storage and general engineering contracting services. Further, it is involved in the construction of the wind turbine foundation, booster station, and wind tower foundation; installation of the transition section, offshore wind towers, and structure and equipment components; submarine cable laying; and operation and maintenance of offshore wind farms. The company is based in Beijing, China.
